title: Google Dawn UAF
summary: [P1] CVE-2026-5281 is an use-after-free vulnerability in Google Dawn that could allow a remote attacker to compromise the renderer. It is being actively exploited in the wild with no available patch. Why now: Reported exploitation in the wild (confidence: 0.90)
